title: Piglin-Chan
description: Have you ever looked at a Piglin and went "Hey... that kinda looks like an anime girl's face?" Me too.
body:
# ‧⁺✧✿~~ PIGLIN-CHAN ~~✿✧⁺‧

Introducing the pack of your dreams (or nightmares, I don't judge); Piglin-Chan!

Have you ever looked at a Piglin and went "Hey... that kinda looks like an anime girl's face?"

Me too. So here's a pack to make that a reality! The Piglin, Piglin Brute, and Zombified Piglin are turned into tsundere little critters by this pack.

![Piglins in a Bastion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jp8iBl4U/images/f169a49722d3dac43fa50e148ad8651957c9d7e0.png)
